title: The weak maximum principle for solutions of degenerate elliptic equations with lower order terms
summary: We prove a weak maximum principle for subsolutions of a degenerate, linear, second order elliptic operator with lower order terms, building on the existence results recently proved by the authors and Çetin, Dal and Zeren.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有低阶项的退化线性二阶椭圆算子的弱最大值原理
AI.motivation: 基于作者与Çetin、Dal、Zeren最近建立的存在性结果，研究退化椭圆算子的最大值原理，这类算子在奇异系数或退化系数情况下具有重要应用
AI.techniques: 利用最近建立的存在性结果，构建比较原理，处理退化椭圆算子的低阶项影响，采用最大值原理的标准分析框架但针对退化情况
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有低阶项的退化线性二阶椭圆算子的弱最大值原理，为这类算子的解的正则性和定性分析提供基础
AI.significance: 完善了退化椭圆算子的理论框架，为研究具有奇异或退化系数的偏微分方程提供重要工具，特别是在几何分析和物理模型中的应用

title: Local and Global Results on Three Dimensional Rarefaction Waves in Spherical Symmetry
summary: We construct centered rarefaction wave solutions given background solutions to the compressible Euler equations. The flow considered in this article is the homentropic flow of perfect gas governed by compressible Euler equations and the gamma-law equation of state in 3-D spherical symmetry. We prove the existence of local in time rarefactions for general background solutions, which corresponds to one side of the solution to the Riemann problem in spherical symmetry. We also prove the existence of global in time rarefactions for background solutions that are close to constant states with reasonable decay.

AI.tldr: 在球对称三维可压缩欧拉方程中，构造了以一般背景解为中心的稀疏波解，证明了局部存在性和特定条件下的全局存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩欧拉方程在球对称三维空间中的稀疏波解，这是黎曼问题在球对称情况下的重要组成部分。背景是均熵完美气体流动，采用gamma律状态方程。
AI.techniques: 使用特征线方法、能量估计和衰减分析，结合球对称几何的特殊结构来处理非线性双曲守恒律系统。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对一般背景解证明了局部时间稀疏波解的存在性；2. 对接近常状态且具有合理衰减的背景解证明了全局时间稀疏波解的存在性。
AI.significance: 扩展了可压缩欧拉方程中稀疏波理论，为球对称流体的黎曼问题提供了完整解结构，对气体动力学和天体物理中的冲击波传播有重要理论意义。

title: Vanishing layer thickness limit of convection in multilayer porous media
summary: Within the Darcy-Boussinesq framework for convection in multilayered porous media, we investigate the singular limit in which the thickness of one layer tends to zero. We establish that the solution of the full system converges to that of the corresponding limiting model with one fewer layer. The convergence is established in two complementary senses: (i) strong $L^{2}$-convergence over arbitrary finite time intervals, and (ii) upper semi-continuity of the global attractors describing the large-time asymptotic behavior.

AI.tldr: 建立了多孔介质多层对流模型中当一层厚度趋于零时解向相应少层模型解的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质多层对流模型（Darcy-Boussinesq框架）中，当某一层厚度趋于零时的奇异极限问题，旨在理解层厚消失对系统动力学行为的影响
AI.techniques: 奇异极限分析、能量估计方法、全局吸引子理论、L²收敛性证明、上半连续性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在任意有限时间区间上，完整系统解强L²收敛到少层模型解；2) 描述大时间渐近行为的全局吸引子具有上半连续性
AI.significance: 为多孔介质多层对流模型的简化提供了严格数学基础，建立了层厚消失极限的收敛性理论，对理解复杂地质结构中的对流现象有重要意义

title: Controllability of a Semilinear System of Parabolic Equations with Nonlocal Terms
summary: This paper extends our previous controllability results for a class of coupled linear parabolic systems with nonlocal interactions, motivated by applications in finance such as generalized Black--Scholes models. We establish local null controllability at a fixed time T>0 for a class of semilinear, nonlocally coupled systems driven by a single internal control acting on one component. The proof combines Kakutani's fixed-point theorem with a controllability/observability estimate for the associated linearized dynamics. In addition, we obtain controllability for a broader class of linear systems than those considered in the first article. The paper concludes with remarks on boundary controllability within the same nonlocal framework and with perspectives for future research.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有非局部耦合的拟线性抛物型系统在单分量内部控制下的局部零能控性
AI.motivation: 该研究源于金融数学中的广义Black-Scholes模型等应用，旨在解决具有非局部相互作用的耦合抛物型系统的控制问题，特别是当控制仅作用于系统的一个分量时
AI.techniques: 结合Kakutani不动点定理与线性化动力学的能控性/可观性估计，采用不动点方法处理非线性项，并利用线性系统的能控性结果
AI.main_theorems: 建立了具有非局部耦合的拟线性抛物型系统在固定时间T>0的局部零能控性，同时推广了线性系统的能控性结果到更广泛的类别
AI.significance: 扩展了非局部耦合抛物型系统的控制理论，为金融数学中的偏微分方程模型提供了控制理论基础，并为边界控制问题和未来研究开辟了新方向

title: Existence and bounds of nonlinear singularity-free cosmological solutions in a string-inspired gravity
summary: We provide a rigorous proof for the existence of homogeneous, isotropic and globally singularity-free cosmological solutions in Einstein-dilaton-Gauss-Bonnet (EdGB) gravity with exponential coupling. While numerical studies suggested such solutions exist, a formal proof remained elusive. By employing a novel ``power identity method'' and overcoming significant challenges posed by the strong nonlinearities of the exponential coupling, which are not present in the quadratic coupling analyzed in our companion paper \cite{he2025proofssingularityfreesolutionsscalarization}, we establish a FLRW solution valid for all time $t\in(-\infty,+\infty)$, where the Hubble parameter remains positive and vanishes asymptotically, while the scalar field evolves monotonically. This result align with numerical simulations and offer a firm mathematical foundation for singularity-free cosmology in a string-inspired setting.

AI.tldr: 证明了爱因斯坦-伸缩子-高斯-博内引力中具有指数耦合的齐次、各向同性且全局无奇点的宇宙学解的存在性
AI.motivation: 数值研究表明爱因斯坦-伸缩子-高斯-博内引力中存在无奇点宇宙学解，但缺乏严格数学证明，特别是对于指数耦合情形，其非线性比二次耦合更强
AI.techniques: 采用新颖的"幂恒等式方法"，克服指数耦合带来的强非线性挑战，建立全局时间解
AI.main_theorems: 证明了FLRW解在所有时间t∈(-∞,+∞)存在，哈勃参数保持正定且渐近趋于零，标量场单调演化
AI.significance: 为弦理论启发的无奇点宇宙学提供了坚实的数学基础，验证了数值模拟结果

title: Existence, Stability and Controllability of the parabolic-parabolic thermistor model
summary: In this article we establish the well-posedness, energy estimates, stability, and local null controllability for the thermistor system modeled by a parabolic-parabolic system using a control force acting on just one equation of the system. The proof of the controllability is based on appropriate Carleman estimates and Liusternik's inverse function theorem to obtain the local controllability of the nonlinear system. The coupling of the system happens both in the terms of order zero and one, which requires the use of a special Carleman estimate for the system.

AI.tldr: 建立了热敏电阻系统的适定性、能量估计、稳定性以及局部零能控性，其中控制仅作用于系统的一个方程
AI.motivation: 研究由抛物-抛物系统建模的热敏电阻系统的控制问题，该系统在零阶项和一阶项都存在耦合，且控制仅作用于系统的一个方程，这增加了控制问题的复杂性
AI.techniques: 使用适当的Carleman估计和Liusternik逆函数定理来获得非线性系统的局部能控性，针对系统耦合特点发展了特殊的Carleman估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了热敏电阻系统的适定性、能量估计、稳定性以及局部零能控性，控制力仅作用于系统的一个方程
AI.significance: 为具有复杂耦合结构的抛物-抛物系统控制理论提供了新的方法和结果，对热敏电阻系统的实际控制应用具有理论指导意义

title: Anisotropic elliptic equations involving unbounded coefficients and singular nonlinearities
summary: In this paper, we study the existence and regularity of solutions for a class of nonlinear singular elliptic equations involving unbounded coefficients and a singular right-hand side. Specifically, we are interested to problem whose simplest model is \begin{equation*} -\sum_{j=1}^N\partial_{j}\left([1+u^{q}]\vert \partial_{j} u \vert^{p_{j}-2} \partial_{j} u\right)= \frac{f}{u^γ}\text{ in $\mathcal{D},$}\quad u>0 \text{ in $\mathcal{D},$} \quad u=0 \hbox{ on}\;\; \partial\mathcal{D}, \end{equation*} where $\mathcal{D}$ is a bounded open subset of $\mathbb{R}^{N}$ with $N>2$, $ γ\geq0$, $q >0 $, $p_{j}>2$ for all $j=1,...,N$ and the source term $f$ belongs to $L^1(\mathcal{D})$, with $f \geq 0$ and $f \not\equiv 0$.

AI.tldr: 研究具有无界系数和奇异右端项的非线性奇异椭圆方程解的存在性与正则性
AI.motivation: 研究一类具有无界系数和奇异右端项的非线性奇异椭圆方程，这类方程在数学物理中具有重要应用，特别是在非牛顿流体力学、多孔介质流等领域。方程包含各向异性的p-Laplacian算子，系数依赖于解本身，右端项具有奇异性，给分析带来挑战。
AI.techniques: 使用逼近方法、变分技术、比较原理、先验估计和正则化技术来处理奇异性和无界系数；可能涉及各向异性Sobolev空间理论、单调算子理论和截断方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明在适当条件下，该奇异椭圆方程弱解的存在性，并研究解的正则性性质；可能包括解的正则性估计、唯一性条件以及解在边界附近的行为分析。
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异椭圆方程理论，特别是处理具有无界系数和各向异性算子的情况；为相关物理模型提供了严格的数学基础；发展了处理奇异性和系数依赖解的新技术。

title: Parabolic problems with slightly superlinear convection terms
summary: In this paper we deal with a non-linear parabolic problem which involving a convection term with super--linear growth, whose model is \[ \frac{\partial u}{\partial t}-÷(\mathcal{M}(x,t)\nabla u)= -÷(u\log (e+|u|)E(x,t))+f(x,t), \] where $\mathcal{M}$ is a bounded measurable matrix, the vector field $E$ and the function $f$ belong to suitable Lebesgue spaces. We prove the existence of a unique bounded and unbounded weak solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有超线性增长对流项的非线性抛物问题的有界和无界弱解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究涉及超线性增长对流项的非线性抛物问题，模型方程包含对数增长的对流项，其中系数矩阵有界可测，向量场和源项属于适当的Lebesgue空间
AI.techniques: 使用抛物方程理论、弱解方法、Lebesgue空间理论、能量估计和压缩映射原理或不动点定理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该非线性抛物问题存在唯一的有界弱解和唯一的无界弱解
AI.significance: 扩展了具有超线性对流项的抛物方程理论，为处理对数增长对流项提供了理论框架，在流体力学和反应扩散方程中有潜在应用

title: Differential and Variational Approach to First Order Mean Field Games in a Generalized Form
summary:
We investigate time dependent, first order Mean Field Games on the torus comparing, in a broad and general framework, the classical differential formulation , given by a Hamilton Jacobi equation coupled with a continuity equation, with a variational approach based on fixed points of a multivalued map acting on probability measures over trajectories.
  We prove existence of fixed points for very general Hamiltonians. When the Hamiltonian is differentiable with respect to the momentum, we show that the evaluation curve of any such fixed point solves a continuity equation driven by a vector field associated with the final condition in the Hamilton Jacobi equation.
  This field is defined without requiring additional regularity conditions on the value function solving the Hamilton--Jacobi equation. The field coincides with the classical vector field of Mean Field Systems at space--differentiability points of the value function lying in the space--time regions where optimal trajectories concentrate.
  Our analysis therefore provides a unified framework that bridges the differential and variational viewpoints in Mean Field Games, showing how aggregate optimality conditions naturally lead to continuity-equation descriptions under the sole assumption of differentiability of the Hamiltonian in the momentum variable.

AI.tldr: 该论文为平均场博弈建立了微分表述与变分表述之间的统一框架，证明了在哈密顿量对动量可微的条件下，变分不动点解满足连续性方程。
AI.motivation: 研究平均场博弈中经典的微分表述（Hamilton-Jacobi方程与连续性方程耦合）与基于轨迹概率测度多值映射不动点的变分方法之间的关系，旨在建立两种不同数学框架的统一理论。
AI.techniques: 采用多值映射不动点理论、概率测度分析、变分方法、Hamilton-Jacobi方程理论，以及连续性方程的分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对非常一般的哈密顿量证明了不动点的存在性；2. 当哈密顿量对动量可微时，证明任何不动点的评估曲线都满足由Hamilton-Jacobi方程终值条件驱动的连续性方程；3. 该向量场在值函数空间可微点与经典平均场系统向量场一致。
AI.significance: 为平均场博弈提供了统一的数学框架，连接了微分与变分两种视角，揭示了在哈密顿量对动量可微的单一条件下，聚集最优性条件自然导致连续性方程描述，深化了对平均场博弈数学结构的理解。

title: Non-Euclidean elasticity for rods and almost isometric embeddings of geodesic tubes
summary:
We consider a geodesic $γ$ of length $2L$ in an oriented Riemannian manifold $(\mathcal M, g)$ and a thin tube $Ω^*_h$ around $γ$ of radius $h$. We study an 'elastic' energy per unit volume $E_h(u)$ of maps $u$ from $Ω^*_h$ into another oriented Riemannian manifold $(\tilde {\mathcal M},\tilde g)$. The energy $E_h$ is based on the squared distance of the differentials $du$ from the set of orientation preserving linear maps between the corresponding tangent spaces.
  We prove a compactness result for sequences of maps $u_h$ for which $h^{-4} E_h(u_h)$ remains bounded and we study the $Γ$-Limit of $h^{-4} E_h(u_h)$ as $h \to 0$ with respect to a suitable notion of convergence for $u_h$ that involves certain blow-ups in the radial direction. This $Γ$-convergence result ge\-ne\-ra\-lizes work by Mora and Müller on the limiting energy of thin rods in the Euclidean setting.
  We also obtain an expression for the minimum of the limiting energy as a specific quadratic functional in the difference of the pullbacks of the curvature tensors of $\mathcal M$ and $\tilde{\mathcal M}$ along the curves $γ$ and $u \circ γ$, respectively, thus answering a question by Maor and Shachar, J. Elasticity 134 (2019), pp. 149--173.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了薄管状区域中映射的弹性能量极限行为，将薄杆极限理论推广到黎曼流形背景
AI.motivation: 研究薄管状区域中映射的弹性能量极限行为，将Mora和Müller在欧几里得空间中薄杆的极限能量理论推广到黎曼流形背景，回答Maor和Shachar在弹性理论中提出的问题
AI.techniques: Γ-收敛理论、紧性分析、径向方向的blow-up技术、黎曼几何中的曲率张量分析、薄结构极限理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 当h^{-4}E_h(u_h)有界时映射序列的紧性结果；2) 能量泛函h^{-4}E_h(u_h)的Γ-极限；3) 极限能量的最小值表达式，表示为两个流形沿测地线拉回曲率张量差的二次泛函
AI.significance: 将薄杆极限理论从欧几里得空间推广到黎曼流形，为弹性理论中的几何约束问题提供严格数学框架，连接了微分几何与材料力学，具有理论和应用价值

title: Nonlinear instability of rolls in the 2-dimensional generalized Swift-Hohenberg equation
summary: Within the framework developed in \cite{Gr, JLL, RT1}, we rigorously establish the nonlinear instability of roll solutions to the two-dimensional generalized Swift-Hohenberg equation (gSHE). Our analysis is based on spectral information near the maximally unstable Bloch mode, combined with precise semigroup estimates. We construct a certain class of small initial perturbations that grow in time and cause the solution to deviate from the underlying roll solution within a finite time. This result provides a clear transition from spectral to nonlinear instability in a genuinely two-dimensional setting, where the Bloch parameter $σ$ ranges over an unbounded domain.

AI.tldr: 严格证明了二维广义Swift-Hohenberg方程中roll解的非线性不稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究二维广义Swift-Hohenberg方程中roll解的稳定性问题，旨在从谱不稳定性过渡到非线性不稳定性，特别是在二维无界域中的情况
AI.techniques: 基于Gr、JLL、RT1等文献建立的框架，结合最大不稳定Bloch模附近的谱信息，使用精确的半群估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 构造了一类小初始扰动，这些扰动随时间增长并在有限时间内使解偏离底层roll解，从而建立了谱不稳定性到非线性不稳定性的明确过渡
AI.significance: 在真正的二维无界域设置中，首次清晰展示了从谱不稳定性到非线性不稳定性的过渡，为理解模式形成系统的动力学行为提供了重要理论基础

title: Higher derivative estimates for Stokes equations with closely spaced rigid inclusions in three dimensions
summary: In this paper, we establish higher-order derivative estimates for the Stokes equations in a three-dimensional domain containing two closely spaced rigid inclusions. We construct a sequence of auxiliary functions via an inductive process to isolate the leading singular terms of higher-order derivatives within the narrow region between the inclusions. For a class of convex inclusions of general shapes, the construction of three-dimensional auxiliary functions -- unlike the two-dimensional case -- relies on the decay properties of solutions to a class of two-dimensional partial differential equations with singular coefficients. Taking advantage of this, we obtain pointwise upper bounds of derivatives up to the seventh order for general inclusions. Under additional symmetry conditions, we derive optimal estimates for derivatives of arbitrary order. Consequently, we obtain precise blow-up rates for the Cauchy stress and its higher-order derivatives in the narrow region between the inclusions.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维空间中两个紧密相邻刚性夹杂物之间Stokes方程高阶导数的精确估计，揭示了高阶应力在狭窄区域的奇异性
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中两个紧密相邻刚性夹杂物之间Stokes方程高阶导数的奇异性行为，这在复合材料力学、微流体等领域有重要应用，需要理解高阶应力在狭窄区域的精确渐近行为
AI.techniques: 通过归纳过程构造辅助函数序列来分离高阶导数的主要奇异项；利用二维偏微分方程奇异系数解的衰减性质构造三维辅助函数；在附加对称条件下推导任意阶导数的最优估计
AI.main_theorems: 对一般凸夹杂物得到七阶导数的逐点上界估计；在附加对称条件下得到任意阶导数的最优估计；获得Cauchy应力及其高阶导数在狭窄区域的精确爆破速率
AI.significance: 首次系统研究三维Stokes方程高阶导数在狭窄区域的奇异性，为复合材料力学、微流体装置设计提供理论依据，建立了三维与二维问题在奇异性分析上的本质差异

title: Multiplicity of normalized solutions to the upper critical fractional Choquard equation with $L^2$-supercritical perturbation
summary: We investigate normalized solutions with prescribed $L^2$-norm for the upper critical fractional Choquard equation \[(-Δ)^s u+V(\varepsilon x)u=λu+\big(I_α*|u|^{p}\big)|u|^{p-2}u+\big(I_α*|u|^{q}\big)|u|^{q-2}u\quad\text{in }\mathbb{R}^N,\] where $N>2s$, $0<s<1$, $(N-4s)^+<α<N$, and the nonlocal exponents satisfy \[\frac{N+2s+α}{N}< q< p=\frac{N+α}{N-2s},\] so that both nonlinearities are $L^2$-supercritical and the $p$ term has upper critical growth of Hartree type. Under standard assumptions on the slowly varying potential $V$, we develop a constrained variational approach on the $L^2$-sphere, based on a truncation-penalization of the critical term in the energy functional, to overcome the lack of compactness. We prove that, for all sufficiently small $\varepsilon>0$, the problem admits at least $\mathrm{cat}_{M_δ}(M)$ distinct normalized solutions, where $M$ is the set of global minima of $V$ and these solutions concentrate near $M$ as $\varepsilon\to0$.

AI.tldr: 研究具有上临界增长的双非线性分数阶Choquard方程在L^2约束下的多解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有上临界增长的双非线性分数阶Choquard方程在L^2约束下的多解存在性。该方程包含两个L^2超临界非线性项，其中p项具有Hartree型上临界增长。由于缺乏紧性，需要发展新的变分方法来处理约束问题。
AI.techniques: 采用约束变分方法，基于L^2球面上的能量泛函，通过截断-惩罚技术处理临界项，克服紧性缺失问题；利用Lyusternik-Schnirelmann范畴理论证明多解存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 对于充分小的ε>0，该问题至少存在cat_{M_δ}(M)个不同的归一化解，其中M是势能函数V的全局极小点集，这些解在ε→0时在M附近集中。
AI.significance: 发展了处理上临界分数阶Choquard方程约束问题的变分框架，首次证明了具有双非线性项和缓慢变化势能的归一化解的多重性，为分数阶非局部方程理论提供了新工具。

title: On the smoothness of solutions of fully nonlinear second order equations in the plane
summary: We study interior $C^{2,α}$ regularity estimates for solutions of fully nonlinear uniformly elliptic equations of the general form $F(D^2u)=0$ in two independent variables and without any geometric condition on $F$. By means of the theory of divergence form equations we prove that $C^2$ solutions of the previous equation are $C^{2,\barα(λ/Λ)}$ in the interior of the domain, where $0<λ\leqΛ$ are the ellipticity constants. We finally exploit the theory of nondivergence equations in the plane to obtain $C^{2,\tildeα}$ regularity for an explicit exponent $\tildeα=\tildeα(λ/Λ)>λ/Λ$.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了二维完全非线性一致椭圆方程F(D²u)=0的C²解在内部具有C^{2,α}正则性，其中α仅依赖于椭圆常数比λ/Λ。
AI.motivation: 研究完全非线性椭圆方程F(D²u)=0在二维情况下的内部正则性估计，特别关注不施加任何几何条件于F的情况。这类方程在几何分析、最优控制理论等领域有重要应用，但高维情况的正则性理论通常需要额外结构假设。
AI.techniques: 结合散度型方程理论和非散度型方程理论：首先利用散度型方程理论证明C²解具有C^{2,ᾱ(λ/Λ)}正则性，然后通过平面上的非散度型方程理论获得更优的显式指数α̃(λ/Λ)>λ/Λ。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1) 二维完全非线性椭圆方程F(D²u)=0的C²解在区域内部具有C^{2,ᾱ(λ/Λ)}正则性，其中ᾱ仅依赖于椭圆常数比λ/Λ；2) 进一步得到显式指数α̃(λ/Λ)>λ/Λ，改进了之前的估计。
AI.significance: 该研究为二维完全非线性椭圆方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，特别是在不施加几何条件的情况下。结果建立了椭圆常数比与正则性指数之间的显式关系，对理解这类方程的解的精细结构有重要意义。

title: Homogenization of a thin linear elastic plate reinforced with a periodic mosaic of small rigid plates
summary: In the framework of linearized elasticity, we study thin elastic composite plates with thickness $δ$. The plates contain small, rigid rectangular plates distributed periodically along $\varepsilon$. Between two neighboring rigid plates is an elastic beam with thickness $δ< \varepsilon/3 < 1$. Through a simultaneous process of homogenization and dimension reduction, we obtain the limit model. Our analysis yields Korn-type inequalities adapted to the rigid-elastic geometry of the structure and provides a precise characterization of the limit deformation and displacement fields. In the $2$D limit problem, the bending is the sum of two functions, each depending on only one variable. This is due to the fact that the mixed derivatives of the outer-plane displacement vanish. Finally, the limiting 2D problem is two decoupled plates or strips, each one with just three degrees of freedom: shear along the strip axis, the cross-contraction (-extension), and the cross-bending. The corresponding correctors are defined in the same way in the periodicity cell. In the linearized setting, all the correctors are decomposed.

AI.tldr: 通过同时进行均匀化和降维，研究了含周期性刚性矩形板的薄弹性复合板，得到了极限模型并揭示了其特殊的弯曲特性。
AI.motivation: 研究线性化弹性框架下含周期性刚性矩形板的薄弹性复合板，这些板包含厚度δ的小刚性矩形板，沿ε周期分布，刚性板之间是厚度δ<ε/3<1的弹性梁，旨在通过均匀化和降维的联合过程获得极限模型。
AI.techniques: 同时进行均匀化和降维的联合渐近分析，建立适应刚性-弹性几何结构的Korn型不等式，精确刻画极限变形场和位移场，分析混合导数消失的特性。
AI.main_theorems: 获得2D极限问题，其中弯曲是两个单变量函数的和（由于面外位移的混合导数为零），极限2D问题退耦为两个板或条带，每个只有三个自由度：沿条带轴的剪切、横向收缩/拉伸和横向弯曲。
AI.significance: 为含周期性刚性结构的复合板提供了统一的渐近分析框架，揭示了此类结构的特殊力学行为，对复合材料设计和微结构分析有重要理论意义。

title: $\mathcal{C}^α$-regularity for nonlinear non-diagonal parabolic systems
summary:
In the elliptic theory for $p$-Laplacian-like problems, the Hölder continuity of solutions has been proven for problems arising as Euler--Lagrange equations of a convex potential with $p$-growth that additionally satisfies the splitting condition.
  In this article, we extend these results to the parabolic setting. We investigate nonlinear parabolic systems whose structure parallels the elliptic case but incorporates time dependence. Assuming suitable space-time regularity of $F$ and natural structural conditions analogous to the stationary theory, we establish $\mathcal{C}^α$-regularity of weak solutions in space and time whenever the growth parameter $p>d/2$. This extends the classical result for parabolic systems, which is valid only for $p>d-2$. This is the only regularity result for systems that are far from the radial (Uhlenbeck) structure.

AI.tldr: 将椭圆p-Laplacian类问题的Hölder连续性结果推广到抛物情形，建立了远离Uhlenbeck结构的抛物系统的正则性理论
AI.motivation: 椭圆理论中p-Laplacian类问题的Hölder连续性已有结果，但抛物情形缺乏相应理论，特别是对于远离Uhlenbeck结构的系统
AI.techniques: 抛物正则性理论、能量估计、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser方法、时空尺度分析、凸势能分裂条件
AI.main_theorems: 当增长参数p>d/2时，证明弱解在时空中的C^α正则性，突破了经典结果p>d-2的限制
AI.significance: 首次建立了远离Uhlenbeck结构的抛物系统的正则性理论，扩展了抛物正则性理论的适用范围，为非线性抛物系统分析提供了新工具

title: Stability threshold of the 2D Boussinesq system near Couette flow in an infinite channel
summary: In this paper, we study the stability threshold of the two-dimensional Boussinesq equations around the Couette flow in an infinite channel $\mathbb{R} \times [-1, 1]$ under no-slip boundary conditions. We prove that the Couette flow is asymptotically stable under initial perturbations satisfying $\| \mathbf{v}^{\mathrm{in}} -(y,0)\|_{H^2} \le \varepsilon_0 ν^{\frac12}$, and $\| ρ^{\mathrm{in}}-1 \|_{H^1} + \big\| |\partial_x|^{\frac13} ρ^{\mathrm{in}} \big\|_{H^1} \le \varepsilon_1 ν^{\frac56}$. Compared with the work of Masmoudi, Zhai, and Zhao [J. Funct. Anal., 284 (2023), 109736], where the asymptotic stability of the 2D Navier-Stokes-Boussinesq system around Couette flow in a finite channel $\mathbb{T} \times [-1, 1]$ was established, our result improves the stability threshold for the temperature from $ν^{\frac{11}{12}}$ to $ν^{\frac56}$.

AI.tldr: 本文改进了二维Boussinesq方程在无限通道中Couette流的稳定性阈值，将温度扰动的稳定性阈值从ν^{11/12}提升到ν^{5/6}。
AI.motivation: 研究二维Boussinesq方程在无限通道中Couette流的稳定性问题，改进Masmoudi, Zhai和Zhao在有限通道中的结果，探索更优的稳定性阈值。
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、Sobolev空间分析、分数阶导数技术，在无限通道中处理无滑移边界条件下的稳定性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明当初始速度扰动满足‖v^in-(y,0)‖_{H^2} ≤ ε_0ν^{1/2}，初始温度扰动满足‖ρ^in-1‖_{H^1} + ‖|∂_x|^{1/3}ρ^in‖_{H^1} ≤ ε_1ν^{5/6}时，Couette流是渐近稳定的。
AI.significance: 显著改进了温度扰动的稳定性阈值，从ν^{11/12}提升到ν^{5/6}，为Boussinesq方程的稳定性理论提供了更精确的结果，对流体力学稳定性理论有重要贡献。

title: On solvability of parabolic equations with singular coefficients in odd mixed-norm Morrey-Sobolev spaces
summary: We prove an existence and uniqueness theorem for second-order parabolic equations in the whole space with constant zeroth-order coefficient in mixed-norm Morrey-Sobolev spaces. The main coefficient $a$ is assumed to be measurable in $t$ and BMO in $x$ and the first-order coefficients $b$ are in an appropriate mixed-norm Morrey classes (thus admitting rather rough singularities). The mixed-norm Morrey-Sobolev spaces are ``odd'' in the sense that the interior integration in the formula defining the norm is performed with respect to $t$ and not to $x$ as is customary.

AI.tldr: 证明了常系数二阶抛物方程在全空间混合范数Morrey-Sobolev空间中的存在唯一性定理
AI.motivation: 研究具有粗糙系数的二阶抛物方程在非标准函数空间中的适定性问题，特别是当主系数在时间方向可测、空间方向属于BMO空间，一阶系数属于混合范数Morrey类时
AI.techniques: 混合范数Morrey-Sobolev空间理论、BMO系数处理、奇异性分析、非标准范数结构（时间积分在内部）
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在全空间混合范数Morrey-Sobolev空间中，具有常零阶系数的二阶抛物方程的存在唯一性定理，其中主系数a(t,x)在t可测、在x属于BMO，一阶系数b属于适当的混合范数Morrey类
AI.significance: 扩展了抛物方程理论到更一般的函数空间，允许系数具有更强的奇异性，为处理粗糙系数问题提供了新的分析框架，对PDE理论有重要贡献

title: Asymptotic stability of solitary waves for the b-family of equations
summary: We establish the asymptotic stability of lefton solutions-exponentially localized stationary solitary waves-for the $b$-family of equations with positive momentum density in the regime $b < -1$. Unlike the completely integrable Camassa-Holm $(b=2)$ and Degasperis-Procesi $(b=3)$ cases, this parameter range lies outside integrability and exhibits distinct nonlinear dynamics. Our analysis adapts the Martel-Merle framework for generalized KdV equations to the nonlocal, non-integrable structure of the $b$-family of equations. The proof combines a nonlinear Liouville property for solutions localized near leftons with a refined spectral analysis of the associated linearized operator. These results provide the first rigorous asymptotic stability theory for leftons in the non-integrable $b$-family of equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了b<-1时b-方程左子解在正动量密度条件下的渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究b-方程在非可积参数区域b<-1时的非线性动力学，特别是左子解（指数局部化静止孤立波）的稳定性问题，填补了非可积情形下左子解渐近稳定性理论的空白。
AI.techniques: 将Martel-Merle框架从广义KdV方程推广到b-方程的非局部非可积结构，结合解在左子附近局部化的非线性Liouville性质，以及对相关线性化算子的精细谱分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了b<-1且具有正动量密度的b-方程左子解的渐近稳定性，这是非可积b-方程中左子解的首个严格渐近稳定性理论。
AI.significance: 将可积方程（Camassa-Holm和Degasperis-Procesi）的稳定性理论推广到非可积参数区域，为理解非可积非线性波方程的动力学行为提供了新工具和理论框架。

title: Existence of two thresholds in a bistable equation with nonlocal competition
summary: We consider a nonlocal bistable reaction-diffusion equation, which serves as a model for a population structured by a phenotypic trait, subject to mutation, trait-dependent fitness, and nonlocal competition. Within this replicator-mutator framework, we further incorporate a ''pseudo-Allee effect'' so that the long time behavior (extinction vs. survival) depends on the size of the initial data. After proving the well-posedness of the associated Cauchy problem, we investigate its long-time behavior. We first show that small initial data lead to extinction. More surprisingly, we then prove that that extinction may also occur for too large initial data, in particular when selection is not strong enough. Finally, we exhibit situations where intermediate initial data lead to persistence, thereby revealing the existence of (at least) two thresholds. These results stand in sharp contrast with the behavior observed in local bistable equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部双稳态反应-扩散方程中初始数据大小对种群长期行为（灭绝vs.生存）的双阈值现象
AI.motivation: 研究具有表型特征的种群动力学模型，该模型包含突变、性状依赖的适应度和非局部竞争，特别关注"伪Allee效应"下初始种群规模对长期行为的影响
AI.techniques: 非局部反应-扩散方程的Cauchy问题适定性分析，通过比较原理、能量方法和稳定性分析研究长期行为，特别关注初始数据大小对解演化的影响
AI.main_theorems: 1) 小初始数据导致灭绝；2) 当选择不够强时，过大初始数据也可能导致灭绝；3) 存在中间初始数据导致种群持续生存，揭示了至少两个阈值的存在
AI.significance: 揭示了非局部双稳态方程与经典局部方程的根本差异，为理解种群动力学中初始规模对长期生存的复杂影响提供了理论框架，具有重要的生态学意义

title: Mathematical and numerical study of a model for navigation in stratified waters
summary: We derive a linear model of navigation in a two-layer fluid with a variable velocity of the ship. A spectral version of the model including a Rayleigh damping term is analyzed. We prove that the Cauchy problem has a unique solution if the velocity and if the initial data are sufficiently regular. The case of a constant speed is thoroughly investigated and the importance of a critical speed which separates two types of regimes is pointed out. We propose a numerical scheme based on the discrete Fourier transform for the space discretization and on an exponential integrator for the time discretization. We prove an error estimate for the exponential integrator. Numerical experiments in one and two space dimensions complete the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 建立了考虑船舶变速的两层流体中航行问题的线性模型，分析了谱模型并证明了适定性，研究了临界速度现象，提出了基于指数积分器的数值格式并进行了误差分析。
AI.motivation: 研究两层流体中船舶航行问题，考虑船舶速度变化对流体动力学的影响，建立数学模型描述这种物理现象。
AI.techniques: 谱方法、Rayleigh阻尼项、Cauchy问题适定性分析、指数积分器时间离散、离散傅里叶变换空间离散、误差估计理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了Cauchy问题在速度和初始数据足够正则条件下的唯一解存在性；2. 分析了常速情况，发现了区分两种流态的临界速度；3. 提出了数值格式并证明了指数积分器的误差估计。
AI.significance: 为两层流体中船舶航行问题提供了完整的数学理论框架和数值计算方法，揭示了临界速度现象，对海洋工程和流体力学有重要应用价值。

title: A Generalization of Caffarelli's Contraction Theorem to Nearly Spherical Manifolds
summary: We show that every nearly spherical manifold can be realized as the volume-preserving image of a round sphere, via the Brenier-McCann optimal transport map. This theorem extends Caffarelli's contraction theorem to nearly spherical manifolds and yields, as a corollary, a proof of a perturbative form of Milman's conjecture. The proof is based on a novel stability result for optimal transport maps on the sphere.

AI.tldr: 证明了每个近似球形流形都可以通过Brenier-McCann最优输运映射实现为保体积的圆球像
AI.motivation: 研究背景是几何分析和最优输运理论的交叉领域，核心问题是能否将近似球形流形通过保体积映射实现为圆球像，这涉及到Caffarelli收缩定理的推广和Milman猜想的扰动形式
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括Brenier-McCann最优输运理论、球面上最优输运映射的稳定性分析、几何扰动方法，以及将Caffarelli收缩定理推广到近似球形流形
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：每个近似球形流形都可以通过Brenier-McCann最优输运映射实现为保体积的圆球像；推论：证明了Milman猜想的扰动形式；建立了球面上最优输运映射的新稳定性结果
AI.significance: 理论意义重大：扩展了Caffarelli收缩定理的应用范围，为几何分析提供了新工具，证明了Milman猜想的扰动形式，建立了最优输运与几何分析之间的新联系

title: Mountain pass for the Ginzburg-Landau energy in a strip: solitons and solitonic vortices
summary: Motivated by recent experiments, we study critical points of the Ginzburg-Landau energy in an infinite strip where phase imprinting is applied to half of the domain. We prove that there is a critical width of the cross section below which the soliton solution is a mountain pass solution and the minimizer within the subspace of odd functions. Above the critical width, we find that the mountain pass solution is a vortex with a solitonic behaviour in the infinite direction, called a solitonic vortex. Moreover, depending on the width, we prove that the minimizer in a space with some symmetries can display one or several solitonic vortices. While the problem shares some similarities with the analysis of stability and minimality of the Ginzburg-Landau vortex of degree one in a disk or the whole plane, the change in geometry introduces subtle analytical differences. Extensions to the case of an infinite cylinder in 3D are also given.

AI.tldr: 证明了在无限条带中Ginzburg-Landau能量临界点的存在性和性质，发现临界宽度决定了解的类型（孤子或孤子涡旋）
AI.motivation: 受近期实验启发，研究在无限条带中应用相位印迹的Ginzburg-Landau能量临界点，分析几何形状变化对解性质的影响
AI.techniques: 变分方法、山路引理、对称性分析、临界点理论、Ginzburg-Landau能量泛函分析
AI.main_theorems: 存在临界宽度：低于该宽度时孤子解是山路解且在奇函数子空间中最小化；高于该宽度时山路解是孤子涡旋；宽度不同时对称空间中的最小化子可显示一个或多个孤子涡旋
AI.significance: 揭示了几何约束对Ginzburg-Landau系统解结构的关键影响，为超导和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中的拓扑缺陷研究提供理论框架，并推广到三维无限圆柱情形

title: Velocity Averaging Lemmas: Classical, Quantum and Semi-Classical
summary: Averaging lemmas were introduced as a tool of the mathematical analysis of kinetic equations, i.e. PDEs for functions in phase space $(x,v)$ containing a transport ("advection") term. By integrating over $v$ in velocity space $\mathbb{R}_v^d$ (velocity averaging), one gains regularity for the density in position space $\mathbb{R}_x^d$. The concept was invented independently by V.I. Agoshkov and by F. Golse, B. Perthame, R. Sentis and P.-L. Lions, and successfully applied to the analysis of Vlasov or Boltzmann equations in "classical kinetic theory". In "quantum kinetic theory", the Schrödinger equation for the complex-valued "wave function" in the physical space is converted into the Wigner equation for the real-valued Wigner function in phase space (which can take negative values). The Wigner ("Quantum Vlasov") equation contains the transport term of classical kinetic equations plus a pseudo-differential operator containing the potential. We give answers to the long standing question of whether and to which extent averaging lemmas apply to the "quantum" case of the Wigner equation. The hard part are the "semi-classical" averaging lemmas, where one considers the asymptotics of vanishing Planck constant towards the non-negative Wigner measure. In that context "pure vs. mixed states" play a crucial role, as well as the connection between the Schrödinger equation and Quantum Hydrodynamics (QHD). We present the results for the classical and quantum cases and sketch the "semi-classical" case which is worked out in full detail in a follow-up article.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了经典和量子情况下的平均引理，特别是解决了Wigner方程中量子平均引理的存在性和适用范围这一长期问题。
AI.motivation: 平均引理最初用于经典动理学方程分析，通过速度平均获得位置空间密度的正则性。然而，对于量子动理学中的Wigner方程，平均引理是否适用以及适用范围如何，一直是一个未解决的长期问题。
AI.techniques: 采用经典动理学方程的平均引理技术，扩展到量子Wigner方程；处理包含伪微分算子的量子输运项；分析半经典极限下的渐近行为；区分纯态与混合态。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 经典动理学方程平均引理的结果；2. Wigner方程量子平均引理的适用性定理；3. 半经典极限下平均引理的渐近行为，特别是Planck常数趋于零时向非负Wigner测度的收敛。
AI.significance: 首次系统回答了量子动理学中平均引理的适用性问题，建立了经典与量子动理学之间的桥梁，为量子流体动力学和半经典极限分析提供了理论基础，具有重要的数学物理意义。

title: Functional-Analytic Justification of the Time-Domain Foldy-Lax Approximation for Dispersive Acoustic Media: A Feynman-Diagram Viewpoint
comment: Foldy-Lax Approximation, Time-Domain Scattering, Dispersive Media, Minnaert Resonance, Delayed Hyperbolic System, Neumann Series, Anisotropic Sobolev Space, Feynman Diagrams, Multiple Scattering
summary: This work provides a rigorous functional-analytic justification for a time-domain Foldy-Lax framework that describes multiple acoustic scattering by a cluster of dispersive resonators (modeling gas-filled bubbles), explicitly incorporating dispersion via the Minnaert resonance. The model is formulated as a delayed-coupled hyperbolic system for bubble amplitude interactions. We combine time-domain integral equations, Laplace transforms, and Hardy-Sobolev space techniques to analyze this system, establishing its unique solvability in anisotropic Hilbert spaces, with solutions expressed as convergent Neumann series of convolution operators. We derive geometric decay of truncation errors for resonant incident waves and quantify the contribution of $N$-th order multi-scattering, showing it scales with \(\varepsilon^{N(1-p)+1}\) (relating bubble radius \(\varepsilon\) and inter-bubble distance scaling as $\varepsilon^p$, $p<1$). This dominates the measurement errors, which are of order $\varepsilon^2$, thereby allowing us to capture fields generated by inter-bubble interactions of order $N<\frac{1}{1-p}$. This provides a quantitative relation between the spectra band width of the source field, the closeness distance between the bubbles and the order $N$ of the relevant interactions between the bubbles. Furthermore, a novel connection to Feynman diagrams maps multi-scattering paths to diagrammatic vertices and propagators, simplifying the interpretation of higher-order interactions and kinematic constraints. This framework advances accurate transient wave prediction in dispersive media, with implications for cavitation therapy, seismic imaging, and metamaterial engineering.

AI.tldr: 建立了含色散谐振子（气泡）簇多散射的时域Foldy-Lax框架的严格泛函分析基础
AI.motivation: 为含色散谐振子（模拟充气气泡）的多重声散射提供严格的时域数学框架，通过Minnaert共振显式包含色散效应，解决瞬态波在色散介质中的精确预测问题
AI.techniques: 时域积分方程、拉普拉斯变换、Hardy-Sobolev空间技术、各向异性希尔伯特空间分析、卷积算子的Neumann级数展开、Feynman图表示
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了延迟耦合双曲系统的唯一可解性；2) 推导了N阶多散射贡献的尺度关系ε^{N(1-p)+1}；3) 给出了截断误差的几何衰减；4) 建立了多散射路径与Feynman图的对应关系
AI.significance: 为色散介质中的瞬态波预测提供了严格数学框架，建立了气泡间距、源场谱宽与相关相互作用阶数之间的定量关系，在空化治疗、地震成像和超材料工程中有重要应用

title: Existence and Nonlocal-to-Local Convergence for Singular, Anisotropic Nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard Equations
summary: We study the nonlocal-to-local convergence for a nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard equation with anisotropic and singular kernels. In particular, we show convergence of weak solutions of the nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard equation to weak solutions of a corresponding anisotropic Cahn-Hilliard equation for suitable subsequences. Moreover, we show existence of weak solutions for the nonlocal equation under a condition, which guarantees existence of weak solutions for suitably localized or singular kernels.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程在奇异核情况下的弱解存在性及其向局部各向异性Cahn-Hilliard方程的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程在奇异核情况下的数学理论，特别是非局部模型向局部模型的收敛性，这对于理解相场模型的数学基础具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用非局部变分方法、弱收敛技术、紧性论证，以及处理奇异核的逼近方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程弱解的存在性定理（在特定条件下）；2. 非局部解向局部各向异性Cahn-Hilliard方程弱解的收敛性定理（通过子序列）
AI.significance: 为相场模型提供了严格的数学基础，建立了非局部与局部模型之间的联系，对材料科学中的相分离现象建模有重要理论意义

title: Normalized solutions for the planar Schrödinger-Poisson system with two electrons interaction
summary: This paper focuses on the normalized solutions for the planar Schrödinger-Poisson system with a two-electron interaction, which models the effect between electrons and the electrostatic potential they generate. As the parameters vary, some existence results are established. Specifically, a ground state solution is obtained for some general cases. The existence of two solutions is established for the mass-supercritical case, one of which is a ground state solution and the other one is an excited state solution. We develop a compactness method to deal with the functionals involving logarithmic convolution terms. The Pohožaev identity for the coupled Schrödinger-Poisson system with a logarithmic convolution term is also shown, which is crucial for addressing the mass-supercritical problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了平面Schrödinger-Poisson系统归一化解的存在性结果，包括基态解和激发态解
AI.motivation: 研究具有双电子相互作用的平面Schrödinger-Poisson系统的归一化解，该系统模拟电子与它们产生的静电势之间的相互作用
AI.techniques: 发展了处理含对数卷积项泛函的紧致性方法，建立了带对数卷积项的耦合Schrödinger-Poisson系统的Pohožaev恒等式
AI.main_theorems: 在参数变化时建立了存在性结果：一般情况下的基态解，质量超临界情况下的两个解（一个基态解和一个激发态解）
AI.significance: 为具有对数卷积项的Schrödinger-Poisson系统提供了新的分析方法，解决了质量超临界情况下的存在性问题，扩展了该领域的理论框架

title: Theory And Applications Of One-Sided Coupled Operator Matrices
comment: This article was originally published in: Conf.\ Sem.\ Mat.\ Univ.\ Bari 283 (2003)
summary: The theory of one-sided coupled operator matrices, recently introduced by K.-J. Engel, is an abstract framework for concrete initial value problems and allows complete information on well-posedness, and stability of solutions. These notes are meant as a survey on this rich theory, with a particular stress on applications to initial-boundary value problems with unbounded boundary feedbacks. A diffusion-transport system with dynamical boundary conditions is discussed, and its well-posedness and various other properties are investigated. As a by-product, the well-posedness of a wave equation with dynamical boundary condition is also obtained.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文综述了单边耦合算子矩阵理论及其在具有无界边界反馈的初边值问题中的应用
AI.motivation: 研究背景是K.-J. Engel最近提出的单边耦合算子矩阵理论，该理论为具体初值问题提供了一个抽象框架，能够完整地获得适定性、解稳定性等信息。论文旨在综述这一丰富理论，特别关注其在具有无界边界反馈的初边值问题中的应用。
AI.techniques: 主要使用单边耦合算子矩阵理论框架，这是一种抽象算子理论方法，用于处理具有边界反馈的偏微分方程系统。通过将具体问题转化为算子矩阵形式，利用算子半群理论分析适定性和稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了扩散-输运系统在动态边界条件下的适定性；2. 研究了该系统的各种性质；3. 作为副产品，获得了具有动态边界条件的波动方程的适定性。
AI.significance: 该理论为处理具有边界反馈的偏微分方程系统提供了统一的抽象框架，特别适用于无界边界反馈情形。对扩散-输运系统和波动方程等具体问题的应用展示了该理论的实用价值，为分析复杂初边值问题提供了新的工具。

title: Time-periodic non-radial solutions near monotone vortices in linearized 2D Euler
summary:
We study the linearized 2D Euler equations around radial vortex profiles. Previous works have shown that the strict monotonicity of the vorticity profile leads to axisymmetrization and inviscid damping of non-radial perturbations.
  Given any strictly decreasing radial vortex, we construct arbitrarily close (in low Hölder norms $C^α$, with $0<α< 1$) radial profiles that are merely non-increasing, for which non-radial, time-periodic solutions to the linearized equation exist. This shows that both axisymmetrization and inviscid damping are not robust under small, low-regularity perturbations of the background profile that violate strict monotonicity.

AI.tldr: 证明了线性化2D欧拉方程在径向涡旋剖面附近的严格单调性条件对轴对称化和无粘阻尼的稳健性至关重要
AI.motivation: 研究2D欧拉方程在径向涡旋剖面附近的线性化稳定性，先前工作表明涡度剖面的严格单调性导致非径向扰动的轴对称化和无粘阻尼，本文探讨这一结论对背景剖面微小扰动的稳健性
AI.techniques: 构造性方法：在低Hölder范数下构造任意接近严格递减径向涡旋的仅非递增剖面；线性化方程的时间周期解构造；低正则性扰动分析
AI.main_theorems: 对于任何严格递减径向涡旋，存在在低Hölder范数C^α(0<α<1)下任意接近的仅非递增径向剖面，使得线性化方程存在非径向时间周期解
AI.significance: 揭示了轴对称化和无粘阻尼现象对背景剖面严格单调性的敏感性，表明这些稳定性性质在低正则性扰动下不稳健，对理解2D欧拉方程的线性稳定性理论有重要意义

title: Resonance analysis of one-dimensional acoustic media: a propagation matrix approach
summary: This work analyzes the scattering resonances of general acoustic media in a one-dimensional setting using the propagation matrix approach. Specifically, we characterize the resonant frequencies as the zeros of an explicit trigonometric polynomial. Leveraging Nevanlinna's value distribution theory, we establish the distribution properties of the resonances and demonstrate that their imaginary parts are uniformly bounded, which contrasts with the three-dimensional case. In two classes of high-contrast regimes, we derive the asymptotics of both subwavelength and non-subwavelength resonances with respect to the contrast parameter. Furthermore, by applying the Newton polygon method, we recover the discrete capacitance matrix approximation for subwavelength Minnaert resonances in both Hermitian and non-Hermitian cases, thereby establishing its connection to the propagation matrix framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过传播矩阵方法分析一维声学介质的散射共振，建立了共振频率与显式三角多项式零点的对应关系，并研究了其分布特性。
AI.motivation: 研究一维声学介质散射共振的数学特性，特别关注高对比度区域中的共振行为，建立传播矩阵框架与离散电容矩阵近似之间的联系。
AI.techniques: 传播矩阵方法、Nevanlinna值分布理论、牛顿多边形方法、渐近分析、离散电容矩阵近似。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 共振频率为显式三角多项式的零点；2) 共振虚部一致有界（与三维情况不同）；3) 高对比度区域中次波长和非次波长共振的渐近行为；4) 恢复Hermitian和非Hermitian情况下次波长Minnaert共振的离散电容矩阵近似。
AI.significance: 为一维声学散射共振提供了系统的数学框架，揭示了高对比度介质中共振的精细结构，建立了传播矩阵与离散电容矩阵方法之间的理论联系，对波传播和材料设计有重要意义。

title: Global and local existence of solutions for a novel type of parabolic Kirchhoff system with singular term

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶Kirchhoff系统在具有对数非线性项下的弱解存在性、爆破与全局存在性以及解的稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究一类具有新型Kirchhoff函数和对数非线性项的分数阶p-Laplacian耦合系统，这类系统在非局部算子理论、非线性波动方程和材料科学中有重要应用，特别是对数非线性项在量子力学和场论中具有物理意义。
AI.techniques: 使用Faedo-Galerkin方法证明弱解存在性；基于初始能量的临界、次临界和超临界水平分析解的爆破与全局存在性；应用Komornik积分不等式研究解的稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在适当Kirchhoff函数假设下弱解的存在性定理；2. 基于初始能量水平的有限时间爆破和全局存在性结果；3. 正初始能量下解的稳定性定理
AI.significance: 将经典Kirchhoff问题推广到分数阶p-Laplacian情形，并引入对数非线性项，发展了非局部算子理论；为具有对数非线性的耦合系统提供了系统的存在性、爆破性和稳定性分析框架

title: Solutions to Sobolev Supercritical Nonlinear Schrodinger Equations on an Annulus via a Hopf Reduction Method
summary: This paper investigates the existence of positive solutions with a prescribed mass for nonlinear Schrodinger equations on an annulus, possibly in the Sobolev supercritical regime. A reduction method based on the Hopf fibration is used to transform the problem into a lower-dimensional one. We obtain a new mass critical threshold and we show that in the new mass subcritical or critical regimes there exists a positive solution which corresponds to a global minimizer, while in the mass supercritical regime, there exists two positive solutions which correspond to a local minimizer and a mountain pass solution respectively. Some other problems are also discussed in this paper.

AI.tldr: 利用Hopf纤维化的降维方法研究环面上非线性薛定谔方程具有给定质量的正解存在性，建立了新的质量临界阈值
AI.motivation: 研究环面（annulus）上非线性薛定谔方程具有给定质量约束的正解存在性问题，特别是在Sobolev超临界情形下。这类问题在数学物理中具有重要意义，涉及约束变分问题和质量守恒的波函数。
AI.techniques: 基于Hopf纤维化的降维方法，将高维问题转化为低维问题；变分方法中的全局极小化子和山路解；质量临界阈值的分析；在质量次临界、临界和超临界不同区域采用不同的存在性证明策略。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了新的质量临界阈值；2. 在质量次临界或临界区域，存在对应于全局极小化子的正解；3. 在质量超临界区域，存在两个正解，分别对应于局部极小化子和山路解。
AI.significance: 为环面上具有质量约束的薛定谔方程提供了系统的存在性理论；Hopf纤维化降维方法为处理高维几何问题提供了新思路；对质量临界现象的理解有重要贡献，可能应用于玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚等物理问题。

title: Conservative Formulations of the Standard Enskog and Povzner Equations
summary: This article introduces a conservative formulation of the Standard Enskog equation and the Povzner equation, both of which generalize the Boltzmann equation by incorporating the contribution of particle volume in collisions. The primary result expresses these collision integrals as the divergence with respect to the velocity variable v of a mass current. Moreover, the terms v C[f,f] and |v|^2 C[f,f], where C[f,f] denotes the Standard Enskog or Povzner collision integral, are represented as phase-space divergences (that is, divergences in both position and velocity) of corresponding momentum and energy currents. This work extends Villani's earlier result (Math. Modelling Numer. Anal. M2AN 33 (1999), 209--227) for the classical Boltzmann equation to the case of dense gases.

AI.tldr: 将Villani关于Boltzmann方程的散度表示结果推广到考虑粒子体积的Standard Enskog方程和Povzner方程
AI.motivation: Boltzmann方程描述稀薄气体动力学，但实际应用中需要考虑粒子体积效应的稠密气体。Standard Enskog方程和Povzner方程通过引入粒子体积贡献来推广Boltzmann方程，但缺乏类似Villani对Boltzmann方程建立的散度表示形式。
AI.techniques: 采用守恒形式重构碰撞积分，将碰撞积分表示为速度变量的散度，并将动量项和能量项表示为相空间（位置和速度）的散度，扩展了Villani的散度表示技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. Standard Enskog和Povzner碰撞积分可表示为速度变量v的质量流散度；2. 动量项v C[f,f]和能量项|v|^2 C[f,f]可表示为相空间（位置和速度）的动量和能量流散度。
AI.significance: 为稠密气体动力学方程提供了新的数学表示形式，可能简化数值模拟、守恒律分析和熵不等式证明，将稀薄气体理论工具扩展到稠密气体领域。

title: Biharmonic Equations
summary: In this note we devise and analyse well-posed variational formulations and operator theoretical methods for boundary value problems associated to the biharmonic operator. Of particular interest are Neumann type and over- and underdetermined (maximal and minimal) boundary value problems.

AI.tldr: 为双调和算子的Neumann型及超定/欠定边值问题建立了适定的变分公式和算子理论方法
AI.motivation: 双调和算子的边值问题在弹性理论、流体力学和几何分析中有重要应用，特别是Neumann型边界条件以及超定（最大）和欠定（最小）边值问题缺乏系统的适定性分析
AI.techniques: 变分公式方法、算子理论框架、Sobolev空间理论、边界迹算子分析、Fredholm理论
AI.main_theorems: 建立了双调和算子Neumann型边值问题的适定变分公式，证明了超定和欠定边界值问题的适定性，发展了相应的算子理论框架
AI.significance: 为双调和算子的非标准边值问题提供了系统的数学基础，在弹性板理论、Stokes流和Willmore曲面理论中有重要应用

title: Dirichlet heat kernel estimates for parabolic nonlocal equations
summary: In this article we establish the optimal $C^s$ boundary regularity for solutions to nonlocal parabolic equations in divergence form in $C^{1,α}$ domains and prove a higher order boundary Harnack principle in this setting. Our approach applies to a broad class of nonlocal operators with merely Hölder continuous coefficients, but our results are new even in the translation invariant case. As an application, we obtain sharp two-sided estimates for the associated Dirichlet heat kernel. Notably, our estimates cover nonlocal operators with time-dependent coefficients, which had remained open in the literature.

AI.tldr: 建立了非局部抛物型方程在$C^{1,\alpha}$区域上的最优$C^s$边界正则性，并证明了高阶边界Harnack原理
AI.motivation: 研究非局部抛物型方程在非光滑区域上的边界正则性问题，特别是对于仅具有Hölder连续系数的非局部算子，即使在平移不变情况下该问题也尚未解决
AI.techniques: 采用边界Harnack原理方法，处理具有时间依赖系数的非局部算子，适用于广泛的算子类
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在$C^{1,\alpha}$区域上建立非局部抛物型方程的最优$C^s$边界正则性；2. 证明高阶边界Harnack原理；3. 获得Dirichlet热核的尖锐双边估计
AI.significance: 填补了非局部抛物型方程边界正则性理论的空白，特别是解决了时间依赖系数情况下的公开问题，为相关分析提供了重要工具

title: Prescribed energy solutions of concave-convex type problems involving sign-changing or vanishing weights
summary: We provide an abstract approach to find couples $(λ,u) \in \mathbb{R} \times X$ satisfying $$Φ_λ(u)=c \quad \mbox{and} \quad Φ'_λ(u)=0,$$ for some suitable values of $c \in \mathbb{R}$. Here $Φ_λ$ is a $C^1$ functional (set on a Banach space $X$) whose main prototype is the energy functional associated to a concave-convex problem with sign-changing or vanishing weights. This approach allows us to derive several existence, multiplicity and bifurcation type results for the equation $Φ'_λ(u)=0$ with $λ$ fixed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种抽象框架，用于寻找参数化泛函的临界点对(λ,u)，特别适用于带变号或消失权重的凹凸型问题
AI.motivation: 研究参数化泛函Φ_λ的临界点问题，特别是当λ固定时寻找满足特定能量水平的解对(λ,u)。主要动机是处理带变号或消失权重的凹凸型非线性问题，这类问题在偏微分方程中常见但分析困难
AI.techniques: 抽象临界点理论框架，结合变分方法和拓扑度理论；利用能量水平约束和参数依赖性分析；适用于Banach空间上的C^1泛函
AI.main_theorems: 建立了寻找满足Φ_λ(u)=c且Φ'_λ(u)=0的解对(λ,u)的抽象存在性理论；推导了当λ固定时方程Φ'_λ(u)=0的存在性、多重性和分歧类型结果
AI.significance: 为处理带变号或消失权重的凹凸型非线性问题提供了统一的理论框架；扩展了临界点理论的应用范围；为相关偏微分方程的多解性和分歧现象研究提供了新工具

title: Absence of Exponential Stability and Polynomial Stabilization in a Class of Beam Models with Tip Rotary Inertia
summary: We investigate the impact of dissipative dynamic boundary conditions applied at one end of a beam, analyzing their influence on model stability within the Euler-Bernoulli framework. Our primary finding is that hybrid dissipation does not alter the decay characteristics of the original model. We examine two scenarios: first, when hybrid dissipation is the sole dissipative mechanism, and second, when it complements other dissipative mechanisms. In the first case, we demonstrate that hybrid dissipation fails to induce exponential decay, instead producing a slow decay rate of $t^{-1/2}$ for large $t$. In the second case, when acting as a complementary mechanism, hybrid dissipation neither enhances nor diminishes the decay behavior of the original model.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Euler-Bernoulli梁模型中，混合耗散边界条件不改变原模型的衰减特性
AI.motivation: 研究梁结构一端施加耗散动态边界条件对模型稳定性的影响，探讨混合耗散作为主要或补充机制时的衰减行为
AI.techniques: Euler-Bernoulli梁理论框架，稳定性分析，衰减率估计，混合耗散机制分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 混合耗散作为唯一耗散机制时，不能产生指数衰减，而是产生t^{-1/2}的慢衰减；2) 混合耗散作为补充机制时，既不增强也不减弱原模型的衰减行为
AI.significance: 澄清了混合耗散边界条件在梁模型稳定性中的作用，对结构振动控制和能量耗散机制设计有理论指导意义

title: Semigroups For Initial-Boundary Value Problems
comment: This article was originally published in: M. Iannelli, G. Lumer (eds), Evolution Equations: Applications to Physics, Industry, Life Sciences and Economics. Progress in Nonlinear Differential Equations and Their Applications, vol 55. Birkhäuser, Basel. 2003, 275--292
summary: We review the theory of one-sided coupled operator matrices with a focus on evolution equations with inhomogeneous boundary conditions. (The original article had no abstract.)

AI.tldr: 回顾具有非齐次边界条件的演化方程的单边耦合算子矩阵理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有非齐次边界条件的演化方程，这类问题在偏微分方程理论中具有重要应用，需要发展相应的算子矩阵理论来处理边界条件与内部方程的耦合
AI.techniques: 算子矩阵理论、演化方程分析、非齐次边界条件处理、耦合系统方法
AI.main_theorems: 回顾和总结单边耦合算子矩阵理论的主要结果，特别是针对具有非齐次边界条件的演化方程的应用
AI.significance: 为处理具有非齐次边界条件的演化方程提供系统的理论框架，对偏微分方程理论和应用数学有重要价值
